summary: Michael Acton, reporting for the Financial Times from San Francisco: About 40 former employees now working at OpenAI have been sent letters directing them to preserve documents and communications and demanding meetings with Apple’s lawyers, according to multiple people familiar with the matter. Apple and OpenAI declined to comment. The decision to hit emplo…
title: Apple Sends Letters to Dozens of Former Employees Now at OpenAI
